teach.situation_en: How {v}much{/v} money do you have? How {v}many{/v} books do you read? I don't have {v}much{/v} time, and I don't have {v}many{/v} friends here. But I have {v}a lot of{/v} dreams.
teach.situation_mm: မင်းမှာ ပိုက်ဆံ ဘယ်လောက် ရှိလဲ။ စာအုပ် ဘယ်နှအုပ် ဖတ်လဲ။ ကျွန်တော့်မှာ အချိန် သိပ်မရှိဘူး၊ ဒီမှာ သူငယ်ချင်းလည်း သိပ်မများဘူး။ ဒါပေမဲ့ အိပ်မက် အများကြီး ရှိတယ်။
teach.use_en: many + countable plural (many books). much + uncountable (much water). a lot of works with both. We mostly use much in negatives and questions.
teach.use_mm: many + countable အများ (many books)။ much + uncountable (much water)။ a lot of က နှစ်မျိုးလုံးနဲ့ ရတယ်။ much ကို အများအားဖြင့် အငြင်း/အမေးမှာ သုံးတယ်။

form.subject: countable
form.form: many books · a lot of books

form.subject: uncountable
form.form: much water · a lot of water

form_note_mm: a lot of → နှစ်မျိုးလုံးနဲ့ ရ (a lot of people / a lot of money)။
much က ‘How much …?’ နဲ့ negative (not much) မှာ ပိုသုံး; many က ‘How many …?’ နဲ့ သုံးတယ်။
teach.trap_en: many = countable, much = uncountable.  WRONG: many money / much books   RIGHT: much money / many books (or a lot of money / a lot of books)
teach.trap_mm: many = ရေတွက်နိုင်၊ much = ရေတွက်မရ။  ✗ many money / much books  →  ✓ much money / many books (a lot of … လည်း ရတယ်)။

examples.mm: ရေ ဘယ်လောက် လိုလဲ။
အလုပ် အများကြီး ရှိတယ်။
သူမ ထမင်း သိပ်မစားဘူး။

walkthrough.subject: countable
walkthrough.rule_mm: ရေတွက်နိုင် (plural) → many
walkthrough.why_mm: books က ရေတွက်နိုင်တဲ့ countable plural ဖြစ်လို့ 'many' သုံးပါတယ် — many people, many cars။

walkthrough.subject: uncountable
walkthrough.rule_mm: ရေတွက်မရ → much
walkthrough.why_mm: money က ရေတွက်မရတဲ့ uncountable ဖြစ်လို့ 'much' သုံးပါတယ်။ much ကို အများအားဖြင့် အငြင်း/အမေးမှာ သုံးတယ်။

walkthrough.subject: a lot of (both)
walkthrough.rule_mm: နှစ်မျိုးလုံး → a lot of
walkthrough.en: {v}a lot of{/v} books · {v}a lot of{/v} money  (✗ many money)
walkthrough.why_mm: a lot of က countable နဲ့ uncountable နှစ်မျိုးလုံးနဲ့ ရတယ်။ many money / much books မမှန်ဘူး — many = countable, much = uncountable။

checks.prompt_mm: စာအုပ် ဘယ်နှအုပ် ရှိလဲ။
သူမမှာ ပိုက်ဆံ အများကြီး ရှိတယ်။
checks.explain_mm: positive sentence မှာ uncountable → a lot of (many money မမှန်)။

teach.model_paragraph_en: Our town has {v}a lot of{/v} people. There are {v}many{/v} shops and {v}many{/v} schools. But there isn't {v}much{/v} traffic, and there isn't {v}much{/v} noise. People don't have {v}much{/v} money, but they have {v}a lot of{/v} kindness.

exercises.prompt_mm: စာအုပ် ဘယ်နှအုပ် ရှိလဲ။

exercises.prompt_en: There are ___ people in the market. (positive)
exercises.explain_mm: countable အတည် → a lot of / many.

exercises.prompt_mm: မှားနေတဲ့ sentence ကို ပြင်ပါ။
answers: She has a lot of money
she has a lot of money.
exercises.explain_mm: money က uncountable → a lot of money (much money)။ many money မမှန်ဘူး။

exercises.prompt_en: Put in order:  much  /  how  /  water  /  ?
Part 1 — quantities. Write 5–8 sentences using many (countable), much (uncountable) and a lot of. E.g. "I have a lot of books. I don't have much time."
exercises.prompt_mm: အပိုင်း ၁ — အရေအတွက်/ပမာဏ။ many (countable)၊ much (uncountable)၊ a lot of သုံးပြီး sentence ၅–၈ ကြောင်း ရေးပါ။ ဥပမာ — "I have a lot of books. I don't have much time." ပြီးရင် scan လုပ်ပါ — ဒါမှမဟုတ် ရိုက်ထည့်ပါ။
exercises.model: I have {v}a lot of{/v} friends. I don't have {v}much{/v} money. There are {v}many{/v} shops near my house. I don't drink {v}much{/v} coffee. How {v}many{/v} languages do you speak?
exercises.explain_mm: many → countable; much → uncountable; a lot of → နှစ်မျိုးလုံး။

grading.rule: many + countable plural; much + uncountable; a lot of + both. much/many common in negatives and questions.
must_check: many with countable, much with uncountable

exercises.prompt_en: Part 2 — describe your town/life. Write a short paragraph (4–6 sentences) using many, much and a lot of.
exercises.prompt_mm: အပိုင်း ၂ — ကိုယ့်မြို့/ဘဝ ဖော်ပြပါ။ many, much, a lot of သုံးပြီး စာပိုဒ်တို (sentence ၄–၆ ကြောင်း) ရေးပါ။ ပြီးရင် scan လုပ်ပါ။
exercises.model: My city has {v}a lot of{/v} people and {v}many{/v} cars. There is {v}a lot of{/v} noise. I don't have {v}much{/v} free time. I don't have {v}many{/v} holidays. But I have {v}a lot of{/v} good friends.
exercises.explain_mm: countable/uncountable ကို ခွဲပြီး many/much/a lot of ကို မှန်အောင် သုံးပါ။

grading.rule: A description using quantity words correctly with countable and uncountable nouns.
